prompt: I've been putting together docs for TaskFlow and I want to make sure they're all telling the same story before I share them with the team. Can you check these three files for me? /coherency-check evals/files/test-1-project-docs/
assertions: Report identifies the Node.js version contradiction (18 vs 20)
Report identifies the framework contradiction (Express vs Fastify)
Report identifies the authentication method contradiction (JWT vs session-based)
Report identifies the task status values contradiction (at least 2 of the 3 conflicting definitions)
Report identifies the rate limit contradiction (100/min vs 60/min)
Report identifies the deployment target contradiction (AWS vs GCP)
Each contradiction includes specific file names and quoted values
Report assigns severity levels to contradictions
After the report, the skill offers to walk through resolution of each contradiction
